description:
Manages application configuration settings by loading them from a central YAML file.

This module provides a `Settings` class that acts as an intelligent interpreter
for the `config.yaml` file. It dynamically constructs paths and commands based
on the execution modes defined in the configuration.

classes.name: Settings
classes.docstring: Main configuration class that loads and interprets all settings from a YAML file.

methods.name: __init__
methods.docstring: Initializes settings by loading the specified configuration file.

methods.name: _load_from_file
methods.docstring: Loads the entire configuration from a YAML file into a dictionary.

methods.name: _get_mode_for_handler
methods.docstring: Determines the execution mode ('local' or 'remote') for a given handler.

methods.name: get_path
methods.docstring: Gets a fully resolved and formatted path for a given handler and context.

methods.name: get_executable
methods.docstring: Gets a fully resolved path to an executable for a given handler.

methods.name: get_command
methods.docstring: Constructs a fully resolved and executable command string.

methods.name: get_database_config
methods.docstring: Gets the database configuration dictionary from the YAML file.

methods.name: get_logging_config
methods.docstring: Gets the logging configuration dictionary from the YAML file.

methods.name: get_processing_config
methods.docstring: Gets the processing configuration dictionary from the YAML file.

methods.name: get_connection_config
methods.docstring: Gets the connections configuration dictionary from the YAML file.
